title: FangSu MTR Addon 方速MTR扩展
description:
Added blocks such as OBJ-format ticket gates, and provided a set of interfaces to simplify the creation of MTR extensions.
添加了OBJ格式的检票闸机等方块，且添加了一系列接口使得你可以更方便的创建MTR扩展
body:
# FangSu MTR Addon · 方速 MTR 扩展

> Also named **FangSu Blocks** / 又称 **方速·方块包**

[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-blue.svg)](https://github.com/596wjr/FangSu_MTR_Addon/blob/main/LICENSE)
[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Fabric-dbd0b4)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Forge-e04e14)](https://minecraftforge.net/)

---

## 重要说明 / IMPORTANT

**NOT compatible with MTR 4.0.0+** · **不兼容 MTR 4.0.0+**

This mod depends on **MTR (3.2.2)**. Download here:
本模组依赖于 **MTR (3.2.2)**，在此下载：

- **MTR**: https://modrinth.com/project/XKPAmI6u

If you find any issues, please report on GitHub Issues.
如果发现问题，请前往 GitHub 提交 Issue。

---

## 功能特性 / Features

### 站台屏蔽门系统 / Platform Screendoors

- **屏蔽门 (Screendoor)** — 带隔离指示灯与门状态灯的标准站台屏蔽门 / Standard platform screen doors with isolation indicator and door status lights
- **屏蔽门玻璃 (Screendoor Glass)** — 透明玻璃版本屏蔽门 / Transparent glass variant of screen doors
- **中央控制箱 (Central Control)** — 屏蔽门系统的中央控制方块 / Central control block for the screen door system
- **端门 (Duanmen)** — 站台两侧的司机门 / Driver doors at both ends of the platform

### 检票闸机与票务系统 / Ticket Barriers & Fare System

- **OBJ 格式 3D 检票闸机** — 使用自定义 OBJ 模型的高品质闸机，支持多种模型选择 / High-quality ticket barriers with custom OBJ models, supports multiple model selection
- **售票机 (Ticket Machine)** — 交互式售票终端，支持购买单程票 / Interactive ticket vending terminal for single-journey tickets
- **单程票 & IC 卡** — 完整的票务物品体系，与 MTR 票务系统无缝集成 / Complete fare item system, seamlessly integrated with MTR fare system

### 乘客信息系统 / Passenger Information Display

- **PIDS (列车到站信息屏)** — 实时显示列车到站信息，支持自定义布局与 JavaScript 脚本 / Real-time train arrival information with customizable layouts and JavaScript scripting
- **吊板显示器 (Diaoban)** — 悬挂式信息显示屏 / Ceiling-mounted information display
- **路线信息牌 (RIS)** & **车站信息牌 (SIS)** — 路线图与车站结构展示 / Route map and station structure display

### 站牌与标志系统 / Signs & Boards

- **可放置站牌 (Sign)**、**墙上标志 (Sign on Wall)**、**高级告示板 (Adv Board)** — 灵活的标志与告示系统 / Versatile signage and bulletin board system

### 自定义列车 / Custom Trains

- **功能型自定义列车** — 可自定义外观与功能，支持 LCD 显示屏 / Customizable trains with LCD display support

### 自定义电梯 / Custom Lifts

- **现代纹理电梯 (Modern Textured Lift)** — 支持自定义模型与纹理 / Extended MTR lifts with custom models and textures

### JavaScript 脚本引擎 / Scripting Engine

- 基于 GraalJS 的高性能脚本引擎，PIDS、标志等支持 JS 脚本实现动态内容 / High-performance scripting engine powered by GraalJS for dynamic content on PIDS and signs
- 内置 GIF 支持、图形纹理绘制、模型辅助等 API / Built-in GIF support, graphics texture drawing, model helper APIs

### OBJ 3D 模型引擎 / OBJ 3D Engine

- 完整的 OBJ 格式加载、解析、写入库（基于 javagl），支持光影模组兼容 / Full OBJ format loading, parsing, and writing library based on javagl, compatible with shader mods

---

## 优秀的扩展包 / Excellent Expansions

- [MTR Beijing Subway Addon 北京地铁扩展](https://modrinth.com/project/SQbV8Djz)
- [MTR Decoration Expansion 地铁装饰扩展](https://modrinth.com/project/zWTQjXZl)
- **MTR CR Addon 中国铁路扩展** — 在内部群聊中发布 / Released in internal community

### 同系列资源包 / Packs in Same Series

- [FangSu Urban Construction Pack 方速·城建包](https://afdian.com/item/8fc2114aa05b11f09d365254001e7c00)
